message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'sk_psock_report_error' sets signal field 'sock.sk_err', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=sock;field=sk_err;offset=544] [oracle:assert=sock.sk_err stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets sk_err without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
